CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2020 Set For Trial On Feb-01-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Omnioxs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Exhibit D To Declaration Of Ana Krtolica In Support Of Defendants Opposition To Plaintiffs Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS OMNIOX, INC., STEPHEN CARY, JOHN WESLEY's Motion To Seal Exhibit D To Declaration Of Ana Krtolica In Support Of Defendants' Opposition To Plaintiff's Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

The Court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-22-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John J, Butts, Esq. 617-526-6515, Michael Mugmon, Esq. 628-235-1006, Francine Bendat, Esq. 650-600-5012 of WilmerHale for Plaintiff.
Ragesh Tangri, Esq. Andrew Perito, Esq. Eneda Hoxha, Esq. 415-362-6666 of Durie Tangri for Defendant Omnioz.

RULING - A R G U E D. 1:27 pm. The Court discloses he practiced law with Mr. Tangri in the past, however this will not affect his ability to be fair and impartial. Plaintiff argues probable validity, purpose in seeking attachment. Defendant responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF 667, L.P., BAKER BROTHERS LIFE SIENCES L.P., SAMSARA BIOCAPITAL, L.P., ECOR1 CAPITAL FUND, L.P., ECOR1 CAPITAL FUND QUALIFIED, L.P.'A Hearing For Right To Attach Order, And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Taken Under Submission.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Exhibit A To Declaration Of Michael Dybbs In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OMNIOX, INC.'s Motion To Seal Exhibit A To Declaration Of Michael Dybbs In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Granted. No opposition filed and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

A Proposed order is submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
